result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:     AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
                                ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.today
), transfers AS (
  -- Each owner change counts as a transfer FROM old_owner
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  -- Agents who handled >0 cases (as either old_owner or new_owner) in period
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner FROM owner_changes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner FROM owner_changes
  ) x
  WHERE owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(owner) <> ''
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.today
), transfers AS (
  -- Each owner change counts as a transfer FROM old_owner
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  -- Agents who handled >0 cases (as either old_owner or new_owner) in period
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner FROM owner_changes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner FROM owner_changes
  ) x
  WHERE owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(owner) <> ''
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.today
), transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner FROM owner_changes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner FROM owner_changes
  ) x
  WHERE owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(owner) <> ''
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY 1

LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
), owner_assign AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.today
), transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assign
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner FROM owner_assign
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner FROM owner_assign
  ) x
  WHERE owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(owner) <> ''
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
